hypothesis: Add item_id x store_id smoothed target encoding (mean sales per item-store pair using training data only with smoothing factor 50). This is a direct encoding of the baseline sales level for each item-store combination, which should be highly predictive. Based on exp_0014 which achieved best score of 0.97640, and exp_0018 which achieved 0.97966. Combining with DOW seasonal lags from exp_0012 (0.94640). Key change: add item_store_enc_smooth feature using full training data stats, while keeping all other features from exp_0012 intact.
